title: LuminusRemaster
description: A remake of an old texture pack, the purpose of which is to improve the display of glowing objects and blocks in Minecraft.
body:
A new texture pack, the purpose of which is to improve the display of glowing objects and blocks in Minecraft. At the moment, it will completely rework torches: they will have a new model and animation.

![Факел](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f2fe8972429ba6260597811cd0949a607fb687d_0.webp)

In the remaster version, the resource pack is adapted to the new version of Minecraft, as well as updated animations
